title: phyla lanceolata var. recognita
intro: Phyla lanceolata var. recognita, also known as frogfruit, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Phyla lanceolata var. recognita include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
